description: Join the 'TranslatorPlanning' meeting in Jitsi Meet (http://localhost:8080/TranslatorPlanning) and create a published poll with the question 'Which language pair needs additional interpreter staffing for the trade conference?' and the following options: 'English - Mandarin Chinese', 'English - Spanish', 'English - Arabic', and 'French - German'. The Polls panel should remain open.

metadata.poll_question: Which language pair needs additional interpreter staffing for the trade conference?
